content.text:
<plugin_info kind="matched_installed">
display_name: Supabase
description: Access your Supabase projects and perform tasks like managing tables, fetching config, and querying data.
skills:
  - supabase-postgres-best-practices: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use this skill when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.
  - supabase: Use when doing ANY task involving Supabase. Triggers: Supabase products (Database, Auth, Edge Functions, Realtime, Storage, Vectors, Cron, Queues); client libraries and SSR integrations (supabase-js, @supabase/ssr) in Next.js, React, SvelteKit, Astro, Remix; auth issues (login, logout, sessions, JWT, cookies, getSession, getUser, getClaims, RLS); Supabase CLI or MCP server; schema changes, migrations, security audits, Postgres extensions (pg_graphql, pg_cron, pg_vector).
mcp_servers:
  - supabase
</plugin_info>
<user_query>
Read these specific files from /Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing and return their full contents:

1. supabase/schema.sql - full contents
2. app/dashboard/reconciliation/page.tsx - full contents
3. app/api/bank-transactions/route.ts - full contents
4. app/api/reconcile/route.ts - full contents
5. app/api/categorize/route.ts - full contents
6. lib/types.ts - full contents

Also search for any file named bank-statement-upload* or containing "bank" in components/ folder and return its contents.

Return the full file contents for each.
</user_query>

I'll read the six requested files and search `components/` for bank-related uploads in parallel.

[REDACTED]

input.final_summary: Gathering the six requested files and searching `components/` for bank-related upload code.

content.text:
Reading bank-related component files from the search results.

[REDACTED]

input.final_summary: Returned full contents for all 6 requested files plus 12 bank-related components from `components/`, including `bank-statement-upload.tsx` and `reconciliation-view.tsx`.
